STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_RELIC_CURSED_CELL_RELI:
On pickup, add [gold]Cursed Blade+[/gold] to your deck.
In combat, while [gold]Cursed Blade+[/gold] is in your deck, taking unblocked damage kills you.
A borrowed sword always demands payment.
STS2_MIO_NUTS_MOD_RELIC_CELL_REGENERATIO:
In combat, HP you lose is stored.
At end of turn, stored HP is reduced by [blue]30%[/blue].
The first Attack you play each turn heals [blue]50%[/blue] of stored HP, then halves it.
Pain is merely another path to repair.
